title: Which character would you spawn in NGE
display_title: Which character would you spawn in NGE
wikitext:
[]: Which character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Thu Jul 16, 2009 2:25 pm hey everybody! odd question, when you could Spawn one character into NGE, ie, from the beggining to the end or at least the main time, (like Asuka who first appeared in Episode 8) wich one would it be? who would you think is a necessary, awesome or just plain fun addition to NGE? may be a character from another anime, or a movie, or a book, or whatever you come up with! don't relay think 'bout it, just smash the buttons with what you just got in mind, if you change your oppinion, just post again!!! the more the better for me it would be: (at least in this moment) Commander Amarao (from FLCL) he has some experience with weird interdimensional things so Angels wouldn't realy shock him and he was fighting to prevent the Apocalypse by giant tire irons! (just watch FLCL) although he pretty much screwed up... or... Haruko Haruhara (also from FLCL) she was simply the best character of FLCL, and imagine her and Asuka in one room... that's what i would call a Bitch Fight! so, now is your turn! P.S.: i would strongly suggest NOT to watch FLCL, it's pretty much retarded, the story is... well there isn't realy a story, it's just 6 episodes long and the 2 characters above are pretty much the only reason why i ever watched FLCL, (they're Awesome) there is just a handfull of good characters in FLCL, realy, just 'bout 4 or 5...

[]: Re: Wich character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 16, 2009 2:32 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: when you could Spawn one character into NGE, wich one would it be?

[]: Re: Wich character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Thu Jul 16, 2009 2:34 pm ^ sounds neat, is it on the forums? or do you maybe have a link? wouldn't mind to read it

[]: Re: Wich character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 16, 2009 3:10 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: or do you maybe have a link?

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Jul 16, 2009 3:15 pm Haruko Haruhara (also from FLCL)

[]: Re: Wich character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:19 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: P.S.: i would strongly suggest NOT to watch FLCL...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:31 pm Kenny from South Park Considering all the stuff that goes on in the show, Kenny would get killed left and right by Angels, spies, explosions, etc. Things would be normal until later in the show people get suspicious at the fact that he showed up in the obituaries 49 times. It then would turn out there is a secret Kennyquarium in the depths of NERV. Also it turns out that... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:38 pm The Big G himself. Godzilla arrives in Tokyo 3 after beging awaken from the Second Impact over 15 years ago. He would later team up with the Eva's to fight a Powerful Angel like no other.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:43 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: The Big G himself. Godzilla arrives in Tokyo 3 after beging awaken from the Second Impact over 15 years ago. He would later team up with the Eva's to fight a Powerful Angel like no other.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:43 pm The narrator from Cat Ninden Teyandee. Would be interesting to hear what kinds of jabs and remarks he'd make about NGE's characters (who would actually be able to hear and respond to him, which would make things even more interesting) and situations. I can already hear the "showed up for the sole purpose of being killed" line being recycled for Matarael.

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:52 pm Homer Simpson.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 16, 2009 4:59 pm DanteNeverCry wrote: Homer Simpson.

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:11 pm I'd love to see him working at NERV

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:19 pm DanteNeverCry wrote: I'd love to see him working at NERV

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:41 pm Cuz it would be interesting to see. Actually... I wonder how Vegeta would do in the NGE universe.

[]: Re: Which character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jul 16, 2009 6:58 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: hey everybody! P.S.: i would strongly suggest NOT to watch FLCL, it's pretty much retarded, the story is... well there isn't realy a story, it's just 6 episodes long and the 2 characters above are pretty much the only reason why i ever watched FLCL, (they're Awesome) there is just a handfull of good characters in FLCL, realy, just 'bout 4 or 5...

[]: Re: Wich character would you spawn in NGE!?             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Jul 16, 2009 7:47 pm Chuck Norris. But, on second thought, maybe not... he'd just instantly destroy all the Angels and make the Evas his bitch. HENRCAST wrote: ARE YOU OUT OF YOUR MIND?! FLCL is AWESOME . Everyone should watch it.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:26 pm TROGDOR

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:28 pm I would add Sensui from YYH since I wanted to see if he can take down the whole NGE universe. Actually... I wonder how Vegeta would do in the NGE universe.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:03 pm here's a good one (in some way, this is a to Sammaeloo with Kenny and South Park if you know what I mean, hahahahaha!! ) ^Taarna from Heavy Metal and just for lulz (WARNING: boobs abound everywhere, super duper NSFW)
